docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANE, RICHARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANE, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1049 MARKET ST. SUITE 507, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANE, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE , $18.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANE, RICHARD
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANE, RICHARD SERVED JAN-18-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRELLA, CHRISTIAN
